svg.text: AI Image Restoration Toolkit · Source Photo → Backend Selection → 5-Step Restoration Pipeline → Output
Tool will pause and ask if not specified
No content alteration · No hallucination · No crop
Only: upscale, sharpen, color-correct, remove artifacts
JSON → plain text · for Gemini web UI
Evaluate resolution, sharpness, noise, color balance,
film grain density, dust/scratches, dynamic range
maintain aspect ratio, reconstruct from existing pixels only
Unsharp mask + detail recovery, restore edge crispness,
enhance micro-contrast, fix original optics/scanning softness
Neutralize aged film dye color casts, restore white balance,
recover true colors, open shadows, recover highlights
Film grain, dust specks, scratches, scanning artifacts
Source image must be added to
